title: Finite Topology And Metric-Ball Checks

solver_reuse.pressure: The current rows are satisfiable finite topology, closure/interior, and metric-ball witnesses; they teach finite set replay but do not yet contain a source-level Boolean contradiction.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote only after adding a malformed finite topology or metric-ball row with a source-linked Bool/CNF or QF_LRA artifact; keep compactness, connectedness, continuity, and general topological-space facts in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite topology membership and subset checks as deterministic Bool formulas.
Replay finite closure/interior witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Encode finite metric-ball checks with exact LRA distance comparisons.
Keep compactness, connectedness, continuity, and general topological-space facts marked Lean-horizon.
